creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
(In reply to Alex from comment #0)
That is rather odd. The fix I sent was against 1.17.1 and didn't bump the DISTVERSION.

If I look at bug #269337, it seems it was committed twice. The second time seems wrong to me. See bug #269337 comment #5 and bug #269337 comment #6.
